name: Test Network — SAN → Green → Orange → Red
description: Three-host test network for runner phase testing. Green Easy entry point escalates to a Red Hard target.

hosts.name: Public SAN
hosts.description: Standard subscriber access node. Publicly listed, no special defenses.
hosts.metaphor: A plain grey corporate lobby terminal.

hosts.name: Ares Logistics Node
hosts.description: Regional logistics host — shipping manifests, routing data, low-grade paydata. Entry-level corporate security.
hosts.metaphor: A busy warehouse floor with cargo containers and forklifts rendered as data constructs.

securitySheaf.gmNotes: Passive Alert — on-call security decker paged.
Active Alert — security decker online, physical security notified.

paydata.name: Ares Seattle Shipping Routes Q3
paydata.gmNotes: Routing data for Ares ground shipments through the Barrens. Useful to smugglers.

paydata.name: Employee Roster — Warehouse Shift Staff
paydata.gmNotes: Names, credstick numbers, and shift schedules for 47 warehouse workers.

files.name: manifest_2057-Q3-NW.dat
files.description: Quarterly shipping manifest for the Pacific Northwest corridor. Cargo types, weights, truck IDs.

files.name: security_access_log_Aug.dat
files.description: Access log for the Seattle warehouse, last 30 days. Badge swipes and anomalies flagged.
files.gmNotes: Reveals that two employees have been accessing after-hours — could be the inside contact the team is looking for.

files.name: routing_contracts_2057.dat
files.description: Third-party routing contracts — carrier names, rates, routes.

slaves.name: Loading Dock Camera Array
slaves.description: 8-camera array covering all loading docks and the truck yard.
slaves.controlEffect: Full visual feed of all loading dock activity. Can pan, tilt, and loop footage.

hosts.name: Ares Regional Security Hub
hosts.description: Mid-tier security coordination host. Alarm systems, personnel files, facility schematics. Real IC on patrol.
hosts.metaphor: A sterile corporate command center. Holographic screens cycle status feeds. IC appear as uniformed security officers.

securitySheaf.gmNotes: Passive Alert — senior security decker Marcus Kane goes active. Ripper deployed.
Active Alert — hardline alert to physical security. All non-essential access cut.
Construct-9 (Killer-8, Probe-6) — last resort before shutdown.

paydata.name: Ares Seattle Facility Schematics — Level 3 Classified
paydata.gmNotes: Full schematics for the Redmond facility including server room locations and guard rotation schedules.

paydata.name: Internal Incident Report — Experiment 7-Alpha
paydata.gmNotes: Classified incident report on a failed weapons test. Corporate espionage goldmine. Fixer contact Haruki will pay premium.

files.name: personnel_dossiers_security.dat
files.description: Dossiers for all Ares security personnel at the Seattle complex. Photos, home addresses, personal data.
files.gmNotes: Rival corp would pay well for this.

files.name: alarm_grid_config_2057.dat
files.description: Active configuration for the facility alarm grid — sensor placements, dead zones, override codes.
files.gmNotes: The team's fixer specifically asked for this.

files.name: experiment_7alpha_report.dat
files.description: Classified internal incident report. Heavy redaction on the public summary version.

slaves.name: Level 3 Door Lock Grid
slaves.description: Magnetic lock array for 22 secure doors on Level 3. Status shows all currently locked.
slaves.controlEffect: Can open/close/jam any individual door on Level 3. Useful for trapping guards or clearing a path.

slaves.name: Automated Sentry Turret — Docks
slaves.description: Ares Paladin autoturret covering the vehicle bay. Currently in passive mode.
slaves.controlEffect: Can switch to active/passive, override targeting, or disable safety interlock entirely.
slaves.gmNotes: Data bomb will trigger if tampered with — treat as Data Bomb 6 attack.

hosts.name: Ares Project Vault — Black Site Alpha
hosts.description: Top-tier research host. Black IC on standby. Everything here is need-to-know. The target data lives here.
hosts.metaphor: A pitch-black void pierced by red grid lines. Floating data constructs look like caged animals. IC appear as armored drones with weapon locks visible.

securitySheaf.gmNotes: Passive Alert — AI overseer comes online. Ripper and Killer deployed simultaneously.
Active Alert — shutdown sequence initiated (25 turns). Black IC unleashed.
Black IC — Lethal and Psychotropic both deployed. Get out or die.

paydata.name: Project Lazarus — Full Research Archive
paydata.gmNotes: The primary objective. Full experimental data from Project Lazarus — bioweapon research. Megacorp buyers will pay through intermediaries. Massive physical and legal exposure.

paydata.name: Ares Black Site Location Registry
paydata.gmNotes: Secondary target — locations of 12 other black sites worldwide. Multiple buyer interest.

files.name: lazarus_archive_vol1-4.dat
files.description: Four-volume research archive. Heavily encrypted, enormous file. Contents unknown without decryption.
files.gmNotes: Primary mission objective. Data bomb 10 will fire on first access attempt without correct unlock sequence.

files.name: site_registry_classified.dat
files.description: Registry file. Short but encrypted. Filetype suggests geolocation data.

files.name: ai_overseer_core_config.dat
files.description: Configuration file for the host's AI security overseer. Modifying this could blind it.
files.gmNotes: Editing this file (Edit File op, TN Files+3) will disable the AI overseer for the rest of the run — no automatic Passive Alert escalation. High risk, high reward.

slaves.name: Server Room Environmental Control
slaves.description: Climate control for the primary server room. Currently set to optimal cooling.
slaves.controlEffect: Disabling cooling causes thermal shutdown of physical servers in 3 turns — destroys all data including the archive. Can also trigger fire suppression (flooding the room with halon).
slaves.gmNotes: Scorched earth option. If the team can't extract the data, they can at least deny it.

slaves.name: Facility Lockdown Override
slaves.description: Master lockdown controller for the entire Black Site Alpha physical facility.
slaves.controlEffect: Can lock or unlock any door in the facility. Full lockdown traps all personnel inside — useful for the physical team running simultaneous with the decker.
slaves.gmNotes: Coordinate with the street team before touching this.
